query: Plan adding a `harness-security-review` recipe to this harness. Produce the Beads dependency graph with exact bd commands.
expected_skill_contribution: The plan recipe should check for duplicate Beads issues, output exact annotated bd commands in dependency order, and define acceptance criteria — not just describe the plan in prose.
fixture_intent: Validates that the plan recipe checks existing Beads state before creating issues, emits executable bd commands with comments, encodes dependency edges, and stops before implementation.
baseline_gaps: Produces a prose plan without running bd list to check for pre-existing duplicate issues
Outputs no bd create commands or omits the annotated command form
Does not encode dependency edges with bd dep add and defines no acceptance criteria per bead
expected_behavior: Runs `bd list --json` and searches results for duplicate issues before proposing any new ones
Outputs exact `bd create` commands annotated with `# reason` comments explaining each issue
Uses `bd dep add <child> <parent>` to encode dependencies in correct execution order
Does not edit recipe files or claim implementation beads — plan output only, no implementation started

query: Plan the agent roster overhaul: rewrite all existing agents and add 5 new ones. Produce a phased Beads graph with gates at each milestone.
expected_skill_contribution: The plan recipe should produce a phased dependency graph with milestone epics, task beads, discovered-from links, and bd gate commands for milestone waits.
fixture_intent: Validates that the plan recipe structures work into epic→task phases, encodes discovered-from links for emergent work, uses bd gate for human-review milestones, and presents a visual dependency table before commands.
baseline_gaps: Produces a flat list of tasks with no phase structure or epic grouping
Omits dependency edges between phases and between task and epic beads
Proposes no bd gate commands for milestone waits requiring human review
expected_behavior: Creates milestone epic beads before the task beads that depend on them, in phase order
Uses `--deps discovered-from:<parent-id>` for work items discovered during the planning process
Proposes `bd gate` commands for milestone waits that require human review before the next phase begins
Outputs a visual dependency table or diagram before the full bd command sequence

query: Plan the full SDD+TDD cycle for adding eval coverage to all 10 recipes: spec → design → implement → review → verify. Include per-phase acceptance criteria and quality gates.
expected_skill_contribution: The plan recipe should produce a multi-phase SDD+TDD Beads graph covering intent, spec, implementation, and review phases with explicit quality gate conditions per phase.
fixture_intent: Validates that the plan recipe maps all five SDD phases as distinct bead groups, attaches explicit acceptance criteria to each phase bead, enforces ordering via dep add, and gates phase transitions on explicit conditions.
baseline_gaps: Produces a flat task list without SDD phase structure or phase-to-phase ordering
Defines no acceptance criteria per phase bead and no quality gate conditions
Omits bd gate proposals for phase transitions and does not enforce ordering via dep add
expected_behavior: Structures the Beads graph across all five SDD phases in order: intent → spec → implement → review → verify
Each phase bead has explicit acceptance criteria supplied via `bd update --acceptance` or inline in bd create
Phase transitions are enforced using `bd dep add` so downstream phases cannot begin before upstream phases close
Proposes `bd gate` with explicit signal conditions (e.g. all specs approved) before implementation beads become unblocked
